isApproved.description: Returns true if the wallet is Approved and the registration has not expired. Used as the on-chain gate for token deployment.

getIssuer.description: Read the full on-chain issuer struct: status, expiration, verifier, entity ID, and KYB document hash.

getStatus.description: Read the issuer lifecycle status for a wallet (NotRegistered, Approved, Suspended, Revoked, or Migrated).

getWalletEntity.description: Resolve the entity ID bound to an issuer wallet address.

getEntityWallet.description: Resolve the current wallet address bound to an entity ID.

getMigratedTo.description: If a wallet was migrated, returns the new wallet address that replaced it.

defaultExpirationDuration.description: Current default validity period (seconds) applied to new registrations and wallet migrations.

authority.description: Address of the PlatformAccessManager that controls who may call restricted functions.

registerIssuer.description: Register a new issuer or re-register a revoked issuer with fresh KYB. Binds wallet, entity ID, and KYB document hash on-chain.

suspendIssuer.description: Suspend an approved issuer. Expiration and document hash are preserved; isApproved becomes false until reactivated.

revokeIssuer.description: Permanently revoke an issuer. Re-entry requires registerIssuer with fresh KYB.

reactivateIssuer.description: Move a suspended issuer back to Approved. Does not extend expiresAt if already expired.

migrateWallet.description: Move an entity's approval from an old wallet to a new wallet with a fresh KYB document hash.

setDefaultExpirationDuration.description: Update the default validity period for future registerIssuer and migrateWallet calls. Does not retroactively change existing issuers.
